name: Fragments of the Past
effect: Spend Runic Ward to create a Verisium volcano that deals damage on initial eruption and Triggers Ice Fragments.

build_fit.why: Cold element (100% converted to cold). Wrong element for a lightning build.

source: In-game tooltip screenshots 2026-06-07, Runes of Aldur league (patch 0.5)
notes: Detonation-time value on the detail shot was partly illegible.
